hero.headline: Build Smarter Systems. Scale Faster.

sections.whatTitle: Technology solutions designed for operational growth

sections.techText: We build with proven AI, cloud, CRM, communications, and payments technologies.
sections.processText: A clear delivery model from discovery to launch and support.

sections.testimonialsTitle: Practical results across operations, sales, and SaaS systems
